summary: Provided sed commands to reduce message length limits on server or locally. Bio limit reduced from 200 to 100 chars, text from 300 to 150 chars. This should fix MESSAGE_TOO_LONG error. User can apply changes directly on server or commit locally and push.
current_status: Solution provided. Awaiting deployment of reduced message length limits. Once applied and restarted, bot should send orders without MESSAGE_TOO_LONG errors.
